center.name: 格雷羅州
center.summary: 格雷羅州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括Eared poorwill、大瑰喉蜂鸟、青绿阔嘴蜂鸟等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Their breeding range in the western contiguous United States largely consists of the wooded foothills of the Rocky Mountains and many other large mountain ranges from Washington to southern California extending east to central Colorado and westernmost Texas. Somewhat discontinuous breeding populations are found in southeastern Arizona and southwestern New Mexico, thence also somewhat spottily into western Mexico down through Sonora and Chihuahua along the Sierra Madre Occidental as far as Jalisco and Guerrero, their worldwide southern limit as a breeding species.Monson, G

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: forreri is found in western Mexico from Sonora and Chihuahua south to Guerrero

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern Mexico's Sierra Madre Oriental from Tamaulipas south to Veracruz and in western Mexico's Sierra Madre del Sur from central Guerrero to Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: relicta is found in six southwestern Mexico states, Jalisco, Colima, Morelos, Puebla, Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Boucard's wren is found in south-central Mexico, in the states of Puebla, Morelos, Guerrero, and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rayi is found in Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in from Colima south through Michoacán to Guerrero and east to Oaxaca and southwestern Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The West Mexican euphonia is found in the western Mexican lowlands from southeastern Sonora south to central Guerrero

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: marshalli is the more northerly of the two; it is found in southern Puebla and perhaps into eastern Guerrero

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in northeast, central, and southern Mexico from Tamaulipas to Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Digital distribution maps of the birds of the Western Hemisphere. Cooper's hawks can be found across the entirety of the contiguous United States at some part of the year, excepting the northernmost region of Maine. Their breeding range terminates along the Gulf Coast and south Florida, and south of the Rio Grande, excepting their Mexican breeding range consisting of northern Baja California, the mountains from eastern Sonora and Chihuahua to Durango, also recently in northern Coahuila, formerly east into Nuevo Leon and south to Michoacán and possibly still in Guerrero.Howell, S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Most individuals winter in wooded areas in the Mexican state of Guerrero, traveling over by an overland route from their nearest summer home – a prodigious journey for a bird weighing only . Adult male rufous hummingbirds tend to migrate slightly earlier than females or young. Since juveniles and females are essentially indistinguishable from Allen's hummingbird, unless confirmed by close inspection, eastern rufous migrants may be classified as "rufous/Allen's hummingbirds"

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pacifica is found in western Mexico from southern Nayarit south into Guerrero

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of green-fronted hummingbird is found in southern Mexico from central Guerrero into western Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The turquoise-crowned hummingbird is found in the southern Mexican states of Guerrero, Oaxaca, and Chiapas. It inhabits a variety of landscapes including arid thorn, tropical deciduous, gallery, and secondary forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nelsoni is found in southwestern Mexico, from Nayarit, Jalisco and Colima southward to western Guerrero; and C
